mapper.insert: insert into myrecipe (user_id, recipe_id, recipe_title, recipe_image) value (#{user_id}, #{recipe_id}, #{recipe_title}, #{recipe_image})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.imagePath, p.user_id, p.hit, p.created_at, p.updated_at, (SELECT u.name FROM users u WHERE u.id = p.user_id) AS author, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.post_id = p.id) AS likeCount FROM posts p WHERE p.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.update: update users set username = #{username}, name = #{name}, email = #{email}, birthdate = #{birthdate}, gender = #{gender}, allergies = #{allergies} where id = #{id}
